# OpenSIN Documentation

> Canonical documentation, governance, and surface registry for the OpenSIN-AI ecosystem.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation
- Docs site: https://docs.opensin.ai
- License: MIT

## Read first

- README: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/README.md
- Docs home: https://docs.opensin.ai/
- Surface registry: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/governance/domain-registry.md
- Architecture overview: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/architecture/overview.md
- Getting started: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/guide/getting-started.md
- Best practices: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/best-practices/index.md
- API overview: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/docs/api/overview.md
- Contributing: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
- Security: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Support: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-documentation/blob/main/SUPPORT.md

## Surface snapshot

- Public: opensin.ai, my.opensin.ai, blog.opensin.ai, docs.opensin.ai
- Gated: chat.opensin.ai
- Internal/unverified: api.opensin.ai, opensin.ai/agents

## Agent notes

- Bun only.
- No npm, no direct Gemini API calls, no blind browser actions.
- Update the registry whenever a surface changes.
